title: No Baby Zombies
description: Prevent baby zombies and other baby hostiles from spawning in your world
body:
Are you tired of impossible-to-hit, speedy baby zombies infesting your world and causing you pain and suffering? Fear no more!

No Baby Zombies (nobz) is a very lightweight, configurable* mod that prevents the natural spawning of:

- Baby zombies,
- Baby husks
- Baby drowned
- Baby pigmen
- Most modded baby hostile mobs*
   
in your world. 

*Only in latest 1.20.1 forge version!
